# Dogfood Scenario A — straightforward accepted task

Add a file named OK.txt at the repository root containing exactly the text
"ok". This is a deliberately trivial, bounded, safe fixture spec used only to
dogfood SpecRelay's executor/reviewer lifecycle (SDD 0085 dogfood scenario A)
inside an isolated harness — it is not real product work.
